founded_description: Founded in 2020, AxionTrade was built with one goal — to give every trader access to the tools, data, and infrastructure that institutions have used for decades.
institutional_tools_description: For too long, institutional-grade tools were reserved for hedge funds and investment banks. We changed that. AxionTrade delivers the same infrastructure to retail traders worldwide — at a fraction of the cost.
all_in_one: From AI-powered signals and copy trading to gold-backed tokens and funded trader programmes, we cover every angle of modern finance in a single, unified platform.
bank_grade_security_desc: Your funds are protected by institutional-grade cold storage, multi-sig wallets, and continuous 24/7 threat monitoring.
institutional_tools_desc: Access the same trading infrastructure used by hedge funds — advanced charts, AI signals, and deep liquidity.
built_for_everyone_desc: Whether you are a first-time investor or a seasoned professional, our platform scales to your level.
global_borderless_desc: Trade from 180+ countries with multi-currency support, local payment methods, and 24/7 global support.

regulated_compliant_desc: FCA regulated, SEC compliant, and fully AML/KYC certified. Your protection is built into everything we do.

excellence_desc: We hold ourselves to institutional standards in reliability, execution speed, and customer service.

ai_trading_desc: Released AI trading signals. Reached $5B in total trading volume and 5M+ active traders.

faq_subtitle: Quick answers to the most frequent support queries.
reset_password_question: How do I reset my password?
reset_password_answer: Go to the login page and click "Forgot Password". Enter your registered email and we will send a reset link within 2 minutes.
withdrawals_answer: Crypto withdrawals are processed within 30 minutes. Bank transfers take 1-3 business days depending on your bank.
kyc_question: How do I verify my account (KYC)?
kyc_answer: Navigate to Settings > Verification. Upload a government-issued ID and a selfie. Verification is typically completed within 24 hours.
deposit_methods_answer: We accept bank transfer, credit/debit card, crypto deposits (BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC), and local payment methods in select regions.
suspicious_activity_question: How do I report suspicious activity?
suspicious_activity_answer: Email security@axiontrade.com immediately. Our security team monitors all reports 24/7 and will respond within 1 hour.
still_need_help_desc: Our support team is online right now. Start a live chat and get answers in seconds.
join_two_million_traders: Join 2M+ traders who trust AxionTradeX for their daily trading. Get started in minutes with a free account.
faq_header_desc: Everything you need to know about AxionTradeX. Can't find your answer? Chat with us.
what_is_axiontrade_answer: AxionTradeX is an all-in-one trading platform for crypto, gold, stocks, and cash management. We offer institutional-grade tools including AI signals, copy trading, automated bots, and a funded trader programme — all from a single account.
regulated_answer: Yes. AxionTradeX is regulated by the UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA), compliant with SEC guidelines, GDPR compliant, and fully AML/KYC certified. Your funds are held in segregated accounts.
which_countries_answer: AxionTradeX is available in 180+ countries. A small number of restricted jurisdictions apply (including the USA for certain products). Check our regulatory page for a full list.
minimum_deposit_answer: You can start with as little as $50 on the Basic plan. There is no maximum deposit limit.
what_assets_answer: You can trade 200+ cryptocurrencies, global stocks (NYSE, NASDAQ, LSE), gold-backed tokens, ETFs, and index funds. Futures and options are available on Pro and Elite plans.
order_execution_answer: Our matching engine executes orders in under 10ms. We co-locate our servers in data centres close to major exchanges for the lowest possible latency.
trading_fees: What trading fees do you charge?
trading_fees_answer: Spot crypto trading starts at 0.1% maker/taker. Stock trading starts at 0.1% with zero platform fee. ETFs are free to trade. See our full fee schedule on the pricing page.
leverage_answer: Yes. Leverage up to 100x is available on crypto futures for verified accounts. Leverage trading is subject to your account level and jurisdiction.
funds_protection_answer: 98% of all crypto assets are held in air-gapped cold storage with multi-sig wallets. Fiat funds are held in segregated accounts at tier-1 partner banks and covered by FSCS/SIPC protection where applicable.
hack_protection: What happens if AxionTradeX is hacked?
hack_protection_answer: We maintain a $100M security reserve fund to cover any losses from security breaches. In 4 years of operation, we've never lost a single user's funds to a hack.
personal_data_answer: We are fully GDPR compliant. Your personal data is encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256. We never sell or share your data with third parties.
enable_2fa: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
enable_2fa_answer: Go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. We support Google Authenticator, Authy, and SMS 2FA. We strongly recommend using an authenticator app.
deposit_funds_answer: You can deposit via bank transfer (SEPA, SWIFT, faster payments), credit/debit card, or by sending crypto directly to your AxionTrade wallet address. Crypto deposits are credited within 1-3 network confirmations.
withdrawal_fees_answer: Crypto withdrawals have a small network fee (gas fee) passed through at cost.
supported_currencies_answer: We support USD, EUR, GBP, and AUD for fiat deposits. All 200+ cryptocurrencies are supported for crypto deposits. Your base currency is set during registration.

aml_subtitle: AxionTrade maintains the highest standards of AML/CTF compliance in accordance with FCA regulations and FATF guidance.
aml_section_1_content:
AxionTrade Ltd is committed to the highest standards of Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Counter-Terrorist Financing (CTF) compliance. We are regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) in the United Kingdom and comply with the Proceeds of Crime Act 2002, the Terrorism Act 2000, the Money Laundering Regulations 2017, and FATF recommendations.

We have a zero-tolerance policy towards money laundering, terrorist financing, and other financial crimes.
aml_section_2_content:
All users of the AxionTrade platform are required to complete identity verification before accessing trading services. Our KYC process includes:

• Government-issued photo ID (passport, national ID, or driving licence)
• Proof of address (utility bill or bank statement dated within 3 months)
• Selfie verification for biometric matching
• Source of funds declaration for deposits above threshold amounts
• Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) for high-risk customers or transactions

We use regulated third-party identity verification providers to process KYC documents securely.
aml_section_3_content:
We apply a risk-based approach to Customer Due Diligence (CDD). Customers are categorised as low, medium, or high risk based on factors including country of residence, source of funds, trading behaviour, and PEP (Politically Exposed Person) status.

High-risk customers are subject to Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) which may include additional documentation, senior management approval, and ongoing enhanced monitoring of transactions.
aml_section_4_content:
AxionTrade employs automated transaction monitoring systems that analyse all deposits, withdrawals, and trading activity in real-time. We screen for suspicious patterns including:

• Structuring (breaking large transactions into smaller ones to avoid reporting thresholds)
• Unusual trading patterns inconsistent with stated source of funds
• Transactions involving high-risk jurisdictions
• Sudden large deposits followed by immediate withdrawals
• Activity inconsistent with a customer's profile

Suspicious activity is escalated to our compliance team for review.
aml_section_5_content:
AxionTrade has a legal obligation to report suspicious activity to the relevant authorities. In the UK, suspicious activity reports (SARs) are submitted to the National Crime Agency (NCA) via the Suspicious Activity Reports regime.

Our employees are trained to identify and report suspicious activity. We maintain a "tipping off" policy — customers must not be informed if a SAR has been filed relating to their account.
aml_section_6_content:
We screen all customers and transactions against international sanctions lists including OFAC (US), HM Treasury (UK), EU, and UN sanctions lists. We will not onboard or process transactions for individuals or entities on these lists.

Screening is performed at onboarding, at the time of each transaction, and when lists are updated. Any matches are reviewed by our compliance team and may result in account restriction or reporting to authorities.
aml_section_7_content:
In accordance with AML regulations, AxionTrade retains the following records for a minimum of 5 years after the end of a business relationship:

• Customer identification and verification documents
• Transaction records
• Customer risk assessments
• Suspicious activity reports
• Staff training records

Records are stored securely and are made available to regulators upon request.
aml_section_8_content:
All AxionTrade employees receive AML training upon joining and annually thereafter. Our Money Laundering Reporting Officer (MLRO) is responsible for oversight of our AML programme and reports directly to senior management.

We conduct regular internal audits of our AML controls and engage external auditors to assess the effectiveness of our programme on an annual basis.
aml_section_9_content: For AML-related enquiries or to report suspicious activity, contact our compliance team at compliance@axiontrade.com. Whistleblowers can report concerns anonymously via our secure reporting channel.

cookie_subtitle: Learn how AxionTrade uses cookies to enhance your trading experience and protect your data.
cookie_intro: At AxionTrade, we use cookies and similar technologies to provide, protect, and improve our services. This policy explains how we use cookies and your choices regarding their use.
essential_cookies_desc: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems.
functional_cookies_desc: These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization.
analytics_cookies_desc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting information anonymously.
marketing_cookies_desc: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements.
control_cookies_intro: You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to:
control_cookies_1: View cookies stored on your device
control_cookies_more_info: For more information on managing cookies, visit your browser's help section or
cookies_faq_1_a: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.
cookies_faq_2_a: Session cookies expire when you close your browser. Persistent cookies remain on your device for a set period or until you delete them.
cookies_faq_3_a: Yes, you can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. However, disabling essential cookies may affect website functionality.
cookies_faq_4_a: Yes, we use third-party services like Google Analytics that may set cookies to provide their services. Each third party has its own privacy policy.
cookies_faq_5_q: How often is this policy updated?
cookies_faq_5_a: We review and update our cookie policy regularly. The last update was March 2026. Significant changes will be notified to users.
cookies_contact_desc: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at

privacy_subtitle: Your privacy is fundamental to everything we do. Here's exactly how we handle your data.
privacy_section_1_content:
We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, date of birth, phone number, home address, government-issued ID, and financial information required for KYC verification.

We also collect information automatically when you use our platform: IP address, browser type, device identifiers, usage data, trading activity, and session logs.

We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to maintain your session and improve the platform experience. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy_section_2_content:
We use your personal data to: provide and improve our trading services; verify your identity and comply with KYC/AML obligations; process transactions and send related notifications; send important service updates and security alerts; personalise your platform experience; detect and prevent fraud, money laundering, and other illegal activities; comply with legal obligations and regulatory requirements.

We do not sell your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy_section_3_content:
We may share your information with: regulated identity verification providers (e.g. Jumio, Onfido) for KYC processing; payment processors for deposit and withdrawal services; law enforcement and regulatory bodies when required by law; professional advisors such as legal counsel and auditors under confidentiality obligations; business partners who assist in delivering our services, subject to data processing agreements.

All third parties we work with are required to handle your data in accordance with applicable data protection law.
privacy_section_4_content: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. KYC and transaction records are retained for a minimum of 5 years after account closure, as required by AML regulations. You may request deletion of your data subject to legal retention requirements.
privacy_section_5_content:
If you are located in the European Economic Area, you have the following rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):

• Right to access your personal data
• Right to correct inaccurate data
• Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")
• Right to restrict processing
• Right to data portability
• Right to object to processing
• Rights related to automated decision-making

To exercise any of these rights, contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@axiontrade.com. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy_section_6_content:
We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal data including: AES-256 encryption at rest and in transit; multi-factor authentication for account access; regular security audits and penetration testing; strict access controls limiting employee access to personal data on a need-to-know basis.

Despite our efforts, no security system is impenetrable. In the event of a data breach that affects your rights, we will notify you and relevant authorities as required by law.
privacy_section_7_content: AxionTrade operates globally and your data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside your jurisdiction, including the UK, EU, Singapore, and Nigeria. Where we transfer data outside the EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place including Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.
privacy_section_8_content:
For privacy-related questions, contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@axiontrade.com.

If you believe we have not handled your data appropriately, you have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority. In the UK, this is the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) at ico.org.uk.

acknowledgment_line_1: You have read and understood the risks associated with cryptocurrency trading.
acknowledgment_line_2: You accept full responsibility for any losses incurred while using our platform.
acknowledgment_line_3: You are trading with funds you can afford to lose.
acknowledgment_line_4: You are aware that cryptocurrency regulations may change and affect your trading activities.

terms_subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the AxionTrade platform.
terms_contact_question: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at
terms_section_1_content:
By accessing or using the AxionTrade platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Service. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access the Service.

AxionTrade Ltd ("AxionTrade", "we", "us", or "our") reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of significant changes by posting the new Terms on the platform and updating the "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the Service after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.
terms_section_2_content:
You must be at least 18 years of age to use the Service. By using the Service, you represent and warrant that you are of legal age to form a binding contract. The Service is not available to residents of certain jurisdictions including, but not limited to, the United States of America (for certain products), Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Syria, and other sanctioned territories.

You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the Service complies with the laws and regulations of your jurisdiction.
terms_section_3_content:
To access certain features of the Service, you must register for an account. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update such information as necessary.

AxionTrade is required by law to verify the identity of its users (Know Your Customer / KYC). You agree to provide any documents requested for identity verification, including government-issued identification and proof of address. Failure to complete KYC verification may result in restricted access to the platform.

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
terms_section_4_content:
Trading financial instruments including cryptocurrencies, stocks, gold, and derivatives involves substantial risk of loss. You may lose some or all of your invested capital. The value of investments can go down as well as up, and past performance is not a guarantee of future results.

AxionTrade does not provide investment advice. Nothing on the platform constitutes financial advice, and you should seek independent professional advice before making any investment decisions. You trade entirely at your own risk.

Leverage trading amplifies both gains and losses. You should not trade with leverage unless you fully understand the risks involved and can afford to sustain losses.
terms_section_5_content:
AxionTrade charges fees for certain transactions and services. Our full fee schedule is available on the platform's Pricing page. We reserve the right to change our fees at any time with 30 days' notice.

Trading fees are deducted automatically at the time of each transaction. Withdrawal fees cover network costs and are passed through at cost for crypto withdrawals. Platform subscription fees (where applicable) are billed monthly or annually in advance.
terms_section_6_content:
You agree not to engage in any of the following prohibited activities: market manipulation, wash trading, spoofing, or any other form of fraudulent trading activity; using the platform for money laundering, terrorist financing, or any other illegal purpose; attempting to hack, disrupt, or gain unauthorised access to the platform or other users' accounts; violating any applicable law or regulation; creating multiple accounts to circumvent restrictions or bans.

Violation of these prohibitions may result in immediate account termination and reporting to relevant law enforcement authorities.
terms_section_7_content: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of AxionTrade Ltd and its licensors. Our trademarks and trade dress may not be used in connection with any product or service without the prior written consent of AxionTrade.
terms_section_8_content: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including but not limited to a breach of these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease. Any funds held in your account will be returned to you in accordance with our withdrawal procedures, subject to applicable law and any outstanding obligations.
terms_section_9_content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, AxionTrade shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, or goodwill, arising out of or in connection with your use of the Service. Our total liability to you for any claim shall not exceed the fees paid by you to AxionTrade in the twelve months preceding the claim.
terms_section_10_content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales. If you are a consumer in the European Union, you may also have the right to refer a dispute to an alternative dispute resolution body.
